answer: The 2024 Wizard spell list has 20 cantrips (level 0) in the catalogue: aspersion-acide (Acid Splash), bouffee-de-poison (Poison Spray), contact-glacial (Chill Touch), coup-au-but (True Strike), coup-de-tonnerre (Thunderclap), elementalisme (Elementalism), faux-amis (Friends), glas (Toll the Dead), illusion-mineure (Minor Illusion), lumiere (Light), lumieres-dansantes (Dancing Lights), main-du-mage (Mage Hand), message (Message), piqure-mentale (Mind Sliver), poigne-electrique (Shocking Grasp), prestidigitation (Prestidigitation), rayon-de-givre (Ray of Frost), reparation (Mending), trait-de-feu (Fire Bolt), voile-defensif (Blade Ward).
